mission_title: Making IT Knowledge Accessible to Everyone
mission_text: QuickITFix was born from a simple frustration: finding reliable, practical IT solutions online was too hard. Too many outdated tutorials, too many forum posts that went nowhere, too much jargon with too little clarity.
mission_text2: We set out to change that — by creating a single, trusted destination where IT knowledge is clear, current, and community-powered.

team.name: Sandeep Duhan
team.bio: 10+ years in IT infrastructure, networking and cloud solutions. Passionate about making tech knowledge accessible.

team.name: Rahul Kumar
team.bio: Certified ethical hacker and security researcher covering the latest threats, vulnerabilities and defense strategies.

team.name: Priya Sharma
team.bio: AWS and Azure certified professional sharing practical guides on cloud architecture and DevOps pipelines.
